name: Customer pays a deposit invoice via Stripe
description: After contract signing, a deposit invoice is generated and emailed. Customer pays via card on the public invoice page. Funds + receipt are recorded.

persona.name: Asha Patel
persona.context: Contract just signed. Diego asked for a 25% deposit.

preconditions: Contract signed, deposit invoice created at $107.50 (25% of $430)
Stripe payment integration configured for Diego's account

steps.expect: Subject 'Deposit invoice — fence repair'; body lists amount, due date, and a Pay CTA
Public invoice page loads; line items, total $107.50, and a 'Pay $107.50' button visible above the fold
Stripe Elements (or equivalent) renders inline; supports Apple Pay if available; clear error messaging on bad card
Success state with receipt. PDF receipt downloadable. Email receipt sent within ~30s.
Payment appears in /payments; outstanding KPI on /dashboard decreases; activity feed records the payment

emails.subject: Deposit invoice from Diego — fence repair
emails.expect: Plain-text fallback works; amount and due date visible without images

emails.subject: Receipt — $107.50 paid
emails.expect: Receipt arrives within 30s; lists last4 of card; no full card data anywhere in the email

evaluationCriteria.check: Pay button is the most prominent element on the public invoice page
Payment feels safe — clear branding, lock icon, business name match
Idempotency: refreshing the success page doesn't double-charge
Stripe Elements pass the platform's a11y baseline; error messages are associated with the relevant field
